---
name: RFC Proposal
about: Propose a change or addition to specifications
title: "[RFC] "
labels: rfc, specification
assignees: ''
---

## RFC Proposal Summary

Provide a short summary of the proposed change.

## Motivation

Why is this change necessary? What problem does it address?

## Proposed Design

Describe the proposed design in detail.

## Impact

What impact will this change have on the architecture or ecosystem?

## Compatibility Considerations

Will this change affect existing specifications or implementations?
